title.en: In this way, these second realms can also rest ...

content.en:
The Annihilation Blood Tiger Clan is now a legend in the Six Thousand Territory, but I didn't expect it to be suppressed.

Ye Tian didn't reveal too powerful extra-dimensional rules, anyway, he couldn't kill many Desolation Blood Tigers, their purpose in these second realms was to resist and prevent these Desolation Blood Tigers from destroying the formation, that's all.

Time passed slowly, and as many of the Desolation Blood Tigers were injured, these Desolation Blood Tigers gradually retreated.

In this way, these second realms can also rest for a while.

In the days that followed, every once in a while, they would face attacks from the Annihilating Blood Tiger Clan.

The second realm is not in danger of their lives, but they often need to urge the formation to fight against the Annihilation Blood Tiger Clan, and their strength is often exhausted, either fighting or recovering their strength, and there is almost no time to cultivate.

Fortunately, a hundred extradimensional epochs are a very short time for the second realm, otherwise they really wouldn't have come to guard it.

......

Unconsciously, twenty ~ extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally gathered a set of materials for refining the second realm spirit puppet, and prepared to refine a second realm spirit puppet.

In order to ensure the success of his refining, he also used the Yutian Lotus Platform to calculate and analyze it to ensure that he had an incomparable understanding and understanding of the refining process, and then began to refine the spirit puppet of the second realm.

Refining the spirit puppet of the second realm requires a powerful extra-dimensional rule realm, and Ye Tian's super-dimensional rule realm is not low, and it will not lag behind.

Other than that.

Refining the spirit puppet of the second realm requires a huge amount of cultivation support, as well as inscribed with various extradimensional rule stripes at the same time, if it is the first time to refine, it is difficult to engrave it all at once.

Therefore, Ye Tian was ready to use the three replica bodies to divide the labor and cooperate to refine the spirit puppet of the second realm together.

If it is three different second realms to refine, it is impossible to work together, let alone have the same mind, it is easy to fail in refining, but Ye Tian's three replica bodies are all himself, and he can definitely refine a spirit puppet at the same time.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian began to refine the spirit puppet of the second realm, and the three copied bodies worked together, perfectly cooperating, and the refining process was very easy.

It can be said that as long as he does not make mistakes, he will be able to refine successfully.

With the passage of time, unconsciously, the superdimensional rule stripe inscription of this spirit puppet was successful, which was equivalent to passing the most critical moment, and the subsequent refining process was very simple.

After a period of time, a lifelike Second Realm Spirit Puppet was refined.

"It's done!"

Ye Tian was quite pleased.

This is a spirit puppet of the second realm, and its combat power is above that of the general spirit puppet of the second realm, and it can probably exert the extradimensional rules of the realm, and its physical strength is still above the peak superdimensional realm of the second realm.

In other words, his combat power is comparable to that of a second-realm peak powerhouse who has comprehended a point of extradimensional rules.

"In terms of real combat effectiveness, it is not weaker than me, or even above me!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Such a spirit puppet, if it is taken out and sold, is definitely worth more than one million super dimensional dao coins, or even more.

The point is that such a spirit puppet is very rare, and it can't be bought even with extradimensional Dao coins, which is enough to exchange for some precious things.

It's a pity that he can't take it out now, otherwise it will be too eye-catching.

Ye Tian refined this spirit puppet, but not to protect himself, his strength is second only to or even not weaker than this spirit puppet, naturally he does not need it to protect, its purpose is to protect his relatives, for example, when Ye Xingchen goes out to practice, this spirit puppet can secretly protect him.

If one day, this spirit golem is useless, but it can be sold.

Some more years have passed.

Ye Tian gathered a few materials for medium super dimensional dao soldiers and used them to refine medium super dimensional dao soldiers.

The medium super dimensional dao soldier he wants to refine is a medium super dimensional dao soldier - the immortal dimensional armor, which is a medium super dimensional dao soldier with a whole body defense, and its value is still above that of ordinary medium super dimensional dao soldiers.

However, the difficulty of refining this kind of medium extradimensional Dao weapon is also extremely high.

Even though Ye Tian analyzed and deduced the refining process in advance, he still failed to refine twice, and only succeeded in refining the third time.

With this Immortal Armor, Ye Tian's combat power and life-saving ability naturally increased dramatically.

Due to Ye Tian's frequent intrusion into various forbidden areas and treasure places to find materials, on this day he broke into an area of the 6822nd Territory, and after breaking into this area, he scanned this area and found that a battle broke out here not long ago.

Moreover, his replication talent sensed the existence of an extradimensional realm, and the other party was hidden in the dark, but he couldn't hide the replication talent that had been upgraded and evolved.

Just as he was about to leave, the surrounding void was sealed, and a woman with a wonderful figure and a full body of extradimensional armor appeared.

Although the extra-dimensional armor on this woman's body was somewhat broken, the aura she emitted was very terrifying, and it was not an ordinary extra-dimensional armor.

"The high-level super-dimensional dao soldiers, although they are broken, are still far above the medium-level super-dimensional dao soldiers. "[]

This moment.

He knew the identity of the other party thoroughly.

The third realm existence who was hunted down by Yandu Heavenly Pavilion!

Unexpectedly, he didn't deliberately look for the other party, just to find resources, and actually ran into the other party.

The other party is hidden here, no wonder it is difficult to find.

Moreover, this third realm definitely has a treasure on his body that shields and deduces, otherwise Yandu Tiange would not be able to deduce her traces.

Rumble!!!!!

This third realm made a move, and he bombarded it with one finger.

If it is an ordinary second realm early stage extradimensional realm, it will definitely be killed by this finger.

But Ye Tian's combat power is not ordinary.

Rumble!!!!

The powerful extra-dimensional rules erupted from Ye Tian's body, and the medium-level super-dimensional Daoist immortal armor erupted a terrifying defense on his body, and he also performed the super-dimensional annihilation technique, colliding with the other party.

In an instant, the attacks of both sides collided.

Ye Tian was knocked away by a blow, but nothing happened, the opponent's attack seemed terrifying, but it didn't even penetrate his defenses.

"More than two points of extra-dimensional rule realm, your cultivation is only in the early stage of the second realm, and you actually have such a high super-dimensional rule realm!!" The third realm was very surprised.

"Senior, I have no ill will towards you, why attack me!"

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

"You should have guessed my identity, won't you tell Yandu Heavenly Pavilion?"

The Third Realm sneered.

"Senior, I'm a clone, it's useless to kill it!" Ye Tian smiled and said, "If my predecessor kills my clone, I will immediately report it to Yandu Heavenly Pavilion." Besides, my senior's injuries are very serious, and he can't exert too strong combat power, and he may not be able to kill me. If you forcibly kill my clone, I'm afraid that the injury will not be able to hold on, and maybe I will fall. "

The third realm frowned, and did not make any more moves.
